hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, subprocess, os
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
inp = data.get('tool_input', {})
path = inp.get('file_path', '')
if not path.endswith('.py'):
    sys.exit(0)
venv_ruff = '/workspace/.venv/bin/ruff'
if not os.path.exists(venv_ruff):
    sys.exit(0)
r1 = subprocess.run([venv_ruff, 'check', '--fix', path], capture_output=True, text=True)
r2 = subprocess.run([venv_ruff, 'format', path], capture_output=True, text=True)
out = (r1.stdout + r1.stderr + r2.stdout + r2.stderr).strip()
if r1.returncode != 0:
    print(f'ruff: {out}', file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(2)
elif out:
    print(f'ruff: {out}')
"
